category_sources: Official OpenSSH documentation lists ssh-copy-id among OpenSSH manual pages and OpenSSH provides SSH secure networking utilities.
source_facts.description says it adds a public key to a remote machine's authorized_keys file.
display_name_sources: Official OpenSSH manual page uses ssh-copy-id as the command name.
docs_sources: Official OpenSSH manual page index links to ssh-copy-id documentation.
Official openssh-portable README states the official documentation is the man pages for each tool.
repo_sources: Official openssh-portable README gives git clone https://github.com/openssh/openssh-portable and says it is the portable OpenSSH port.
source_facts.source-archive is an OpenSSH portable release tarball.
tags_sources: Official OpenSSH manual pages document ssh-copy-id as part of the OpenSSH tool surface.
source_facts.description says it adds a public key to remote authorized_keys.
source_facts.homepage is the official OpenSSH site.
